image.title: NAY Hirotsu, M Maejima, M Shibusawa, K Amemiya, Y Nagakubo, K Hosaka, H Sueki, H Mochizuki, T Tsutsui, Y Kakizaki, Y Miyashita, M Omata

item.title: Analysis of Covid-19 and non-Covid-19 viruses, including influenza viruses, to determine the influence of intensive preventive measures in Japan.
